title: Partnership Intern - KOL Management & Social Media
description:
About Us

🔹We are a high-growth Web3 payment infrastructure company redefining how users and businesses interact with stablecoins and digital assets.

🔹Backed by licensed financial institutions, and trusted by leading Web3 partners, we provide crypto-fiat payment rails, card-issuing infrastructure, and CaaS (Cards-as-a-Service) solutions for exchanges, wallets, protocols, and global fintech innovators.

🔹Our team comes from top global exchanges, tier-one tech companies, and leading fintechs across APAC and Europe — bringing deep expertise, a builder mindset, and a shared passion for shaping the future of compliant, scalable financial infrastructure.

📍About the Role

As a Partnership Intern - KOL Management & Social Media at DeCard, you’ll support the marketing team in building and managing a strong creator and community ecosystem across multiple markets. The role involves assisting with KOL sourcing, outreach, and day-to-day coordination, ensuring collaborations run smoothly and align with campaign goals and brand guidelines. You’ll also help track performance metrics, compile reports, and identify insights to improve engagement, while gaining hands-on exposure to both strategic planning and execution in a fast-paced Web3 environment.

💼What You Will Do

As a Partnership Intern - KOL Management & Social Media, you’ll work closely with DeCard's marketing team and market-level KOL managers to help grow, engage, and manage DeCard’s creator and community ecosystem. Your responsibilities will include:

  • Supporting KOL engagement across markets - Work alongside KOL managers in different markets to check in ongoing collaborations, track progress, and ensure campaigns are running smoothly.
  • Assisting with KOL sourcing and outreach - Help identify relevant KOLs and creators across Web3, fintech, lifestyle, and payments. Support outreach efforts and maintain organised tracking of conversations and onboarding status.
  • Managing day-to-day KOL coordination - Assist with briefing KOLs, following up on deliverables, timelines, and content submissions, and ensuring alignment with campaign objectives and brand guidelines.
  • Tracking performance & reporting - Monitor KOL performance metrics (reach, engagement, conversions), compile reports, and surface insights on what’s working — and where engagement can be improved.
  • Provide day-to-day support to the marketing team across campaigns and initiatives, gaining hands-on exposure to both strategy and execution in a fast-moving Web3 environment.

🎯What You Bring

Core Requirements

  • Strong communication skills and confidence in engaging external partners
  • Excellent written and spoken English
  • Genuine interest in Web3, crypto, fintech, creators, or digital communities
  • Active on social media; bonus if you follow KOLs, creators, or Web3 communities closely
  • Organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable tracking multiple conversations and tasks
  • Excited to be part of a fast-growing company shaping the future of payments

🌍Why Join Us & Our Culture

  • Impact: Drive meaningful BD strategy and influence the growth of the next-generation Web3 payments.
  • Innovation: Work on cutting-edge crypto-fiat card infrastructure used by leading Web3 companies.
  • Global Exposure: Collaborate across teams in APAC, Middle East, and Europe.
  • Growth: Learn fast, access strategic decision-making, and scale your career in a high-growth startup.
  • Culture: A flat, collaborative, high-ownership environment where your ideas directly influence product direction.

We value people who are:

  • Builders who thrive in 0→1 and 1→100 environments
  • Owners who take initiative and move fast
  • Learners who grow through feedback and curiosity
  • Collaborators who elevate the team
  • Visionaries who care about shaping the future of stablecoin

DeCard — Product Highlight

Spend Stablecoins Seamlessly, Anywhere

DeCard is a next-generation crypto-fiat card powered by DCS Card Centre, a MAS-licensed financial institution with 50+ years of payment expertise. Top up stablecoins and spend instantly at millions of merchants worldwide — bridging Web3 with real-world payments.

How to Apply

Excited about shaping the future of Web3 payments? Join us and redefine digital finance. Apply here

We are an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

postedCompany.description: Diners Club is a premium global brand with a rich heritage as the world's first charge card and is issued today in more than 200 countries.  It is the smart payment choice for mid-to-large corporations, individual business people and professionals.
postedCompany.name: DCS CARD CENTRE PTE. LTD.
